question: Implement LayerNorm using nn.LayerNorm. Compare with BatchNorm which normalizes over batch dimension.
expected_output:
LayerNorm shape: torch.Size([2, 2])
BatchNorm shape: torch.Size([2, 2])
template:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

x = torch.randn(2, 2)

ln = nn.LayerNorm(normalized_shape=???)
bn = nn.BatchNorm1d(2)

print("LayerNorm shape:", ln(x).shape)
print("BatchNorm shape:", bn(x).shape)
answer:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

x = torch.randn(2, 2)

ln = nn.LayerNorm(normalized_shape=2)
bn = nn.BatchNorm1d(2)

print("LayerNorm shape:", ln(x).shape)
print("BatchNorm shape:", bn(x).shape)
